title: Jack Kornfield
blurb: Co-founder of Spirit Rock; a leading Western insight teacher.
lead: A trained clinical psychologist and Buddhist teacher who helped bring insight (Vipassana) meditation to the West.

blocks.text: Jack Kornfield trained as a Buddhist monk in Thailand and is a co-founder of the Insight Meditation Society and Spirit Rock.
He teaches insight meditation and loving-kindness with warmth, humour, and psychological depth.
His free guided meditations and talks — especially on loving-kindness and forgiveness — are a gentle, grounded place to begin.

resources.title: Free talks & meditations
resources.whyHere: Free guided meditations and Dharma talks.

resources.title: Dharma Seed archive
resources.whyHere: Free archive of his and others' talks.
